CONTENT.Career: Schöppner joined 2. Bundesliga club 1. FC Heidenheim in August 2020 from SC Verl. He made his professional debut for Heidenheim in the first round of the 2020–21 DFB-Pokal on 13 September 2020, starting against 3. Liga side Wehen Wiesbaden before being substituted out in the 57th minute for Jonas Föhrenbach. The away match finished as a 1–0 loss.
CONTENT.External links: Jan Schöppner at DFB (also available in German)Jan Schöppner at kicker.deJan Schöppner at SoccerwayCareer statistics

SUMMARY: Jan Schöppner (born 12 June 1999) is a German professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder for Heidenheim.
